errors.selectQuestionFirst: Select a question in the bank and an active section first.
errors.textSectionNoPick: Instruction sections do not need questions; edit the text in the template.

messages.draftRemovedAfterExport: ; draft removed from the draft box
messages.importedFromHistory: Loaded from history into the editor (not saved as a draft; use Save draft if needed).
messages.confirmDeleteDraft: Delete this draft? This cannot be undone.

bankSearchHint: Showing items under resource/{{subject}}/.
emptyBank: No questions in this project yet
emptyBankHint: Add or import questions in the bank, then return here.
emptyFilterHint: Try another subject, collection, type, or search text.
overwriteBody: An export with the same label and subject exists. Overwriting replaces student and teacher PDFs in that folder.
loadPlaceholder: Choose a draft or past paper…
templatesMissing: No template files found. Add templates under the project templates/ folder.
textSectionNoPickHere: This section uses template instruction text; no questions here.
emptySlotHint: (empty) Pick on the left, then use → to add
exportWhenReady: Export is available when every section meets the template counts.
propsIntro: Same metadata and export actions as the top bar; focus edits here.
previewHint: Select a question on the left or in the paper to preview rendering (KaTeX).
texNoticeTitle: Install the PDF typesetting tools to export
texNoticeBody: Exporting PDFs uses a local typesetting install. If it is missing, install it first, then export again. On Windows you can try one-click install below.
texNoticeReady: PDF export tools were detected on this PC.
